headline: Valneva Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Updates
summary: Total product sales of €30.5 million Cash position of €105.3 million as of end March 2026, excluding proceeds from successful reserved offering completed in April 20261Program launched in April to further reduce operating expensesPfizer expected to file regulatory submissions for Lyme disease vaccine candidate Lyon (France), May 13, 2026 – Valneva SE (Nasdaq: VALN; Euronext Paris: VLA), a specialty vaccine company, today reported its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026,

content.title: Valneva Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Updates
content.summary: Total product sales of €30.5 million Cash position of €105.3 million as of end March 2026, excluding proceeds from successful reserved offering completed in April 20261Program launched in April to further reduce operating expensesPfizer expected to file regulatory submissions for Lyme disease vaccine candidate Lyon (France), May 13, 2026 – Valneva SE (Nasdaq: VALN; Euronext Paris: VLA), a specialty vaccine company, today reported its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026,
